content:
# Project Status

## Knowledge Base

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)
- **Fibrewise condition via scheme-theoretic fibre (iter-018, VERIFIED):** a paper
  condition `… on X(s)` for `s : S` realizes as the absolute construction on the fibre
  scheme `X(s) = AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Hom.fiber f s` with inclusion
  `j = f.fiberι s : X(s) ⟶ X` (both from `Mathlib.AlgebraicGeometry.Fiber`), restricting
  modules along `j` via project `Scheme.Modules.pullback` (`(Scheme.Modules.pullback (f.fiberι s)).obj I`
  = `I(s)`). `FiberExtVanishes` = `IsZero (extGroup q (j*I) (j*F))` is axiom-clean
  (`extGroup` carries only `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`). GOTCHA: a signature
  arg `(s : S)` auto-coerces to the `↥S` topological point when fed to `f.fiberι s` — no
  signature change to realize an opaque `… (s : S)` stub. Reuse for any fibrewise §1 condition.
- **Corepresentability counit triad (iter-004, VERIFIED — defeq one-liners):** given
  `haveI := External.H_existence f I F ha` (supplying `IsCorepresentable`) in scope,
  representing object `H := (homTensorFunctor f I F).coreprX`; universal element
  `h := (homTensorFunctor f I F).coreprx` (defeq to `I ⟶ tensorBC f F (H ..)`);
  representability `H_represents := ⟨(homTensorFunctor f I F).coreprW⟩` (inhabits
  `Nonempty (coyoneda.obj (op (H ..)) ≅ homTensorFunctor ..)`). API:
  `CategoryTheory.Functor.{coreprX,coreprx,coreprW}` in `Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Yoneda`.
  Reuse for any "representing object from an EGA existence axiom" node.
- **Ambient abelian category of 𝒪_X-modules:** `X.Modules`
  (= `SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf`); has lim/colim. Use it as the category for
  all sheaf-of-modules statements.
- **X.Modules ↔ SheafOfModules bridge (iter-005, VERIFIED — 5 real defs):**
  `X.Modules = SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf` **definitionally** (`M : X.Modules`
  IS a `SheafOfModules`), and `X.ringCatSheaf.obj = X.presheaf ⋙ forget₂
  CommRingCat RingCat` by `rfl` (`@[reducible]`). Lets `CommRingCat`-indexed
  Mathlib lemmas fire on `M.val` with `R := X.presheaf`. Realized:
  `IsLFP := SheafOfModules.IsFinitePresentation` (direct alias → `\mathlibok`);
  `IsFreeMod := ∃Λ, Nonempty (J ≅ SheafOfModules.free (R:=X.ringCatSheaf) Λ)`
  (does NOT imply IsLFP — arbitrary Λ); `tensorMod := (sheafification
  (R:=X.ringCatSheaf) (𝟙 ..)).obj (Monoidal.tensorObj (R:=X.presheaf) M.val N.val)`
  — tensor at presheaf level then sheafify, **sidesteps the absent
  `MonoidalCategory X.Modules`**; `IsInvertibleMod := ∃L', Nonempty (tensorMod L L'
  ≅ SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)`.
- **Stalk-module instance does NOT auto-synthesize (iter-005 trap):** for
  stalkwise statements (`IsSFlat := ∀x, Module.Flat` over the stalk via
  `Module.compHom` along `f.stalkMap x`), apply the `CommRingCat` instance
  `PresheafOfModules.instModuleCarrier…StalkCommRingCat…` EXPLICITLY
  `(R := X.presheaf) (M := M.val)` via `letI` — it won't unfold
  `X.ringCatSheaf.obj` to `R ⋙ forget₂` itself (error: `failed to synthesize
  Module ↑(X.presheaf.stalk x) …`). `Scheme.stalk` does NOT exist — use
  `X.presheaf.stalk x`.
- **Hand-built "tensor by F" endofunctor on `X.Modules` (iter-006, VERIFIED — `tensorLeft`,
  axiom-clean):** functor literal `obj N := tensorMod F N`; `map φ := (sheafification
  (R:=X.ringCatSheaf) (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map (Monoidal.tensorHom (R:=X.presheaf)
  (𝟙 F.val) φ.val)`. Close `map_id`/`map_comp` with **`exact (congrArg G.map h).trans
  (G.map_id _)`** (resp. `G.map_comp _ _`), where `h : tensorHom (𝟙 F.val) … = 𝟙 …`
  (resp. `= … ≫ …`) is proved section-wise (`ext1 Y; rw [tensorHom_app, id_app…]; exact
  MonoidalCategory.id_tensorHom_id _ _` / `id_tensor_comp _ _`). DEAD ENDS: (1) composing
  `forget ⋙ presheafTensorLeft ⋙ sheafification` to get laws for free FAILS — the `⋙`
  boundary forces `X.presheaf.comp (forget₂) =?= X.ringCatSheaf.obj` (defeq-not-syntactic),
  derailing TC synthesis of `Presheaf.IsLocallyInjective J (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)`; apply
  `sheafification.map` directly inside the literal. (2) `rw`/`simp` via `SheafOfModules.id_val`/
  `comp_val` FAILS (those use the `SheafOfModules R` `𝟙`/`≫`; goal uses the defeq-distinct
  `X.Modules` instance) — `exact`/`congrArg` is defeq-tolerant. (3) `MonoidalCategory.tensor_id`/
  `tensor_comp` do NOT exist; use `id_tensorHom_id`/`id_tensor_comp`, discharged with `exact`
  not `rw`. **`tensorBaseChangeFunctor := Scheme.Modules.pullback f ⋙ tensorLeft F`** (now a
  real def, was opaque).
- **Symmetric-monoidal scaffolding for `tensorMod` (iter-007, VERIFIED — braiding +
  both unitors, axiom-clean):** presheaf braiding `presheafTensorBraiding` via
  `PresheafOfModules.isoMk` + pointwise `β_ (M.obj X) (N.obj X)`; naturality closes with
  `apply ModuleCat.hom_ext; apply TensorProduct.ext'; intro m n; erw
  [PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorObj_map_tmul]` — a **single `erw`** (NOT `simp`).
  `tensorBraiding := sheafification.mapIso presheafTensorBraiding`. Left unitor:
  `presheafLeftUnitor := MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor` (write the long name, NOT `λ_`;
  `𝟙_ (PresheafOfModules _) ≡ PresheafOfModules.unit`, `SheafOfModules.unit_val`);
  `sheafifyValIso A := asIso ((sheafificationAdjunction (𝟙 _)).counit.app A)` (reflective
  ⇒ counit IsIso); `tensorLeftUnitor := sheafification.mapIso presheafLeftUnitor ≪≫
  sheafifyValIso`. Right unitor `tensorRightUnitor := tensorBraiding A unit ≪≫
  tensorLeftUnitor`. DEAD ENDS: (1) `simp`/`simp only` never closes the braiding
  naturality — `tensorObj_map_tmul` uses `ModuleCat.Hom.hom` but `braiding_hom_apply`
  uses `ConcreteCategory.hom`; only `erw` bridges them (defeq swap on pure tensors).
  (2) **Pinning `sheafifyValIso`'s result type** (`…obj A.val ≅ A`) breaks `IsIso`
  synthesis — re-routes `[HasWeakSheafify]/[WEqualsLocallyBijective]` off the
  adjunction's internal path; leave the type INFERRED from the counit.
- **Sheafification inverts a local iso of presheaves of modules (iter-008, VERIFIED —
  `sheafification_map_isIso_of_locallyBijective`, UNCONDITIONAL axiom-clean):** for
  `α : R₀ ⟶ R.obj` locally bijective and `g : P ⟶ P'` locally inj+surj,
  `IsIso ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification α).map g)`. Proof: `sheafification α` is a
  localization functor at `J.W.inverseImage (toPresheaf R₀)` (instance in
  `Mathlib.Algebra.Category.ModuleCat.Sheaf.Localization`) ⇒ `Localization.inverts`;
  `J.W` membership = local bijectivity via `GrothendieckTopology.W_of_isLocallyBijective`
  (needs `WEqualsLocallyBijective`). **TRAP:** take local inj/surj as **explicit args
  `(hi)(hs)` + `haveI`**, NEVER `[instance]` — instance args make synthesis stick on a
  `J` metavariable at the `α = 𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj` application site ("typeclass
  instance problem is stuck"). Apply at call site with `‹_› ‹_›`. This is the reusable
  ENGINE for any sheafify-inverts-local-iso step.
- **`tensorAssoc`/`sheafifyTensorComparison` BLOCKED — gap CHARACTERIZED (iter-008).**
  Comparison `((P̃)⊗Q)̃ ≅ (P⊗Q)̃` = invert `(sheafification 𝟙).map (η_P ⊗ 𝟙_Q)` via the
  engine above — assembles axiom-clean ONLY **conditionally**
  (`sheafifyTensorComparison{,Left}OfLocallyBijective`, `tensorAssocOfLocallyBijective`),
  gating local-bijectivity of `η_P ⊗ 𝟙_Q` behind explicit hyps. The genuine gap:
  *tensoring by a fixed `Q` preserves local bijectivity of `η`.* Local SURJECTIVITY is
  TRUE & presheaf-provable (right-exactness). Local INJECTIVITY is **FALSE at presheaf
  level** (`−⊗Q` not left exact; `ℤ/2 ⊗ (·2:ℤ→ℤ)`) — needs **stalks** (`stalk(η⊗1)=
  stalk(η)⊗stalk(1)`) or **`MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules R)`** (route (b): mimic
  `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Sites/Monoidal.lean` `whiskerLeft`/`whiskerRight` ⇒
  `(Opens.grothendieckTopology X).W.IsMonoidal` ⇒ full localized monoidal via
  `Localization.Monoidal`). BOTH absent from Mathlib. **Do NOT re-attempt the direct
  presheaf route** — it cannot close. Presheaf `MonoidalCategory.associator` needs
  `(C := PresheafOfModules (R ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat))` pinned (`ringCatSheaf.obj`
  form, defeq, fails `MonoidalCategoryStruct` synthesis).
- **Realizing tractable opaque §1 Props (iter-010, VERIFIED — 3 defs axiom-clean):**
  `IsRetrocompact U := QuasiCompact U.ι` (`QuasiCompact : (X⟶Y)→Prop`, `U.ι` open inclusion);
  `IsLocallyFreeOfFiniteRankOn M U := ∀ x∈U, ∃ V≤U nbhd, ∃ Λ, Finite Λ ∧ Nonempty
  ((Scheme.Modules.pullback V.ι).obj M ≅ SheafOfModules.free (R:=(↑V).ringCatSheaf) Λ)`
  (restriction = pullback along `V.ι`, neighbourhood-wise — more faithful than "globally
  free on U"); `IsHalfExact T := ∀ [T.Additive] (S : ShortComplex (ModuleCat A)),
  S.ShortExact → (S.map T).Exact` — **bind `T.Additive` as instance-implicit `∀ [T.Additive]`**
  so the additive⇒preservesZero instance fires for `ShortComplex.map` inside.
- **`extGroup`/`sheafCohomology` REALIZED via universe-relax (iter-011, VERIFIED — 2 defs axiom-clean).**
  The cheap route that works: relax the frozen target `Ab.{u}` → `Ab.{u+1}` (legal because both
  decls are consumed ONLY through universe-agnostic `IsZero(·)`, lines ~447/543), then
  `letI : HasDerivedCategory Y.Modules := HasDerivedCategory.standard Y.Modules;
  haveI := CategoryTheory.hasExt_of_hasDerivedCategory Y.Modules;
  AddCommGrpCat.of (CategoryTheory.Abelian.Ext M N q)`. `Abelian.Ext M N q : Type (u+1)`.
  `sheafCohomology q F := extGroup q (SheafOfModules.unit U.ringCatSheaf) F` (NOT `𝟙_ U.Modules`
  — no monoidal instance surfaces on `X.Modules`, `𝟙_` does not parse). Names: `AddCommGrpCat.of`
  (NOT `AddCommGrp.of`); `Ab` = reducible alias of `AddCommGrpCat`.
  **CORRECTION of the iter-010 KB:** `HasDerivedCategory.standard` was wrongly frozen as a "DEAD END."
  It is only dead against a *fixed `Ab.{u}` signature* (`Y.Modules : Category.{u,u+1}` ⇒ `HasExt.{u+1}`).
  Once the sig is unpinned to `Ab.{u+1}`, `standard` lands directly with zero new infra. So the
  `IsGrothendieckAbelian (SheafOfModules R)` brick (`AB5OfSize` + `HasSeparator`) is **NOT needed**
  for §1 as stated. `IsGrothendieckAbelian.hasExt` would only matter if a *later* node demands
  `HasExt.{u}` at the small universe (none currently does).
- **Affine bridge via Mathlib `tilde` (iter-012, VERIFIED — 2 decls axiom-clean).**
  `Mathlib.AlgebraicGeometry.Modules.Tilde` (v4.30.0) is FAR richer than older snapshots:
  `tilde.adjunction : tilde.functor R ⊣ moduleSpecΓFunctor` (UNIT an iso),
  `tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor`, instances `Full`/`Faithful`/`Additive`/`IsLeftAdjoint`/
  `PreservesFiniteColimits`/`PreservesEpimorphisms`, `tildeFinsupp ι : tilde (ι →₀ R) ≅
  SheafOfModules.free ι`, `Scheme.Modules.fromTildeΓ` (counit) + `isIso_fromTildeΓ_iff` +
  `isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_presentation M P` (counit iso given a GLOBAL `M.Presentation`),
  `presentationTilde`, `(tilde M).IsQuasicoherent`. Realized: `tilde_free := ⟨Λ, ⟨tildeFinsupp Λ⟩⟩`;
  `tilde_of_presentation := haveI := isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_presentation M P; asIso M.fromTildeΓ`.
  `ModuleCat.tilde` is now a `@[deprecated] alias` of `AlgebraicGeometry.tilde`; `tilde` takes
  `{R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : ModuleCat ↑R)` (CommRingCat, not CommRing). **AFFINE-BRIDGE GAP (a)
  RESOLVED iter-013 (see next bullet); GAP (b) STILL OPEN:**
  (b) `theorem (I) [I.IsFinitePresentation] : Nonempty I.Presentation` (local
  `QuasicoherentData` over a cover ⇒ GLOBAL presentation on `Spec R`; = the unproven
  `essImage tilde = quasi-coherent`, Mathlib "We will later show…") — feeds `fp_sheaf_affine_tilde`
  (closes via the landed `tilde_of_presentation`). This is the hardest bridge piece (affine Serre);
  do NOT dispatch as a quick realize lane.
- **`tilde_exact` (tilde sends SES→SES) LANDED axiom-clean (iter-013, VERIFIED — 4 decls).**
  Affine-bridge gap (a) collapsed: the planner's "build a `SheafOfModules` stalk-exactness detection
  layer" framing was WRONG. `Mathlib.Algebra.Homology.ShortComplex.ExactFunctor` reduces functor
  exactness (SES→SES) to `PreservesFiniteLimits ∧ PreservesFiniteColimits`; for `tilde` (a left
  adjoint) the colimit half is FREE, so the only real obligation is **`PreservesMonomorphisms`**.
  Decls (Basic.lean ~L681–752): `tilde_mono` (stalkwise — see next pattern), `tilde_preservesMono`
  (`rw [tilde.functor_map]; exact tilde_mono f`), `tilde_preservesFiniteLimits`
  (`preservesFiniteLimits_iff_forall_exact_map_and_mono` + `…colimits…epi` for the free half),
  `tilde_exact := hS.map_of_exact (tilde.functor R)`. Do NOT re-route through
  `preservesFiniteLimits_of_preservesKernels` (obsolete) — `tilde_exact` is DONE.
- **Stalkwise mono of a SheafOfModules map (iter-013, VERIFIED — `tilde_mono`):** reflect
  `Mono (tilde.map f)` through fully-faithful `modulesSpecToSheaf` (`SpecModulesToSheafFullyFaithful`,
  `Functor.mono_of_mono_map`); detect via `TopCat.Presheaf.mono_of_stalk_mono`; stalk monos from
  basic-open injectivity `stalkFunctor_map_injective_of_isBasis PrimeSpectrum.isBasis_basic_opens`;
  per `D(g)` the section map = `IsLocalizedModule.map (.powers g) … f.hom` (by
  `IsLocalizedModule.linearMap_ext` uniqueness from `tilde.toOpen_map_app`), injective via
  `IsLocalizedModule.map_injective`. **GOTCHAS:** ascribe basis `(α := ↥(Spec R))` (`apply` strict on
  defeq `↥(Spec R)=PrimeSpectrum R`); stalk binder `∀ (x : ↥(Spec R))` MANDATORY (else `x` defaults
  univ 0 → `Injective.{u+1,u+1}` vs `.{1,1}`); NEVER `simpa` on the `@[simp]` `toOpen_map_app`
  (collapses hyp to `True` — use explicit `rw [ModuleCat.hom_comp]`); direct synth of
  `Mono ((tilde.functor R).map f)` TIMES OUT (20000 heartbeats) — use the manual stalk route.
- **Presentation → free presentation, Epi form (iter-014, VERIFIED — 2 decls axiom-clean).**
  `free_isFreeMod Λ : IsFreeMod (SheafOfModules.free (R:=X.ringCatSheaf) Λ) := ⟨Λ, ⟨Iso.refl _⟩⟩`
  (recognizes Mathlib's free sheaf — the building block of `SheafOfModules.Presentation` — as the
  project `IsFreeMod`). `exists_free_presentation_of_presentation M P` (given `P : M.Presentation`) →
  `∃ K G (_:IsFreeMod K)(_:IsFreeMod G)(g:G⟶M)(_:Epi g)(k:K⟶kernel g), Epi k :=
  ⟨_,_, free_isFreeMod _, free_isFreeMod _, P.generators.π, P.generators.epi, P.relations.π, P.relations.epi⟩`.
  Both take the `Presentation` as INPUT (independent of the blocked globalization, like
  `tilde_of_presentation` @012). **DEAD END:** the dual cokernel/right-exact form (`IsColimit
  (CokernelCofork.ofπ g w)` via `P.isColimit`) **times out at isDefEq (200000 hb)** — re-wrapping the
  cofork forces proof-irrelevance defeq vs `Presentation.isColimit`'s own cofork. Use the cheap `Epi`
  form; do NOT retry the cokernel route.
- **Affine-bridge GAP (b) = single named atom (iter-014, verified 4 ways).** The last brick
  `affine_global_presentation : (I) [I.IsFinitePresentation] → Nonempty I.Presentation` (on `Spec R`)
  reduces to ONE absent Mathlib atom: the affine quasi-coherence comparison `Γ(D(g),I) ≅ Γ(I)_g`
  (= essential surjectivity of `tilde.functor R` onto QCoh). Confirmed absent v4.30.0: `Tilde.lean`
  has only `isIso_fromTildeΓ_iff` (the REDUCTION IsIso↔essImage) + `isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_presentation`
  (needs a GLOBAL presentation — circular); `Generators.lean` no local→global on affine; `IsFinitePresentation`
  = LOCAL `QuasicoherentData` only; in-Lean `[I.IsFinitePresentation] ⊢ IsIso I.fromTildeΓ := by infer_instance`
  FAILS. **Resolution: anchor `External.affine_essImage` (Hartshorne II.5.5), do NOT build.** Off-path
  reverse direction `tilde_isFinitePresentation` (module→sheaf) independently blocked: `presentationTilde`
  is a tactic-`def` (`P.generators.I` won't reduce to `↥s`; change/exact/simp/unfold/rw all fail under
  `backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false`) + `Presentation.quasicoherentData` typeclass timeout
  (20000 hb) on `(sheafToPresheaf (J.over X)).IsRightAdjoint`. Do NOT pursue.
- **Affine bridge COMPLETE (iter-015, VERIFIED — bridge closed by anchoring GAP (b)).**
  GAP (b) (`essImage tilde = QCoh`, affine Serre) confirmed a hard multi-iter Mathlib gap (3-iter
  build dead end @012–014) ⇒ **anchored, not built.** `External.affine_fp_tilde {R} (I) [I.IsFinitePresentation]
  : ∃ M, Module.FinitePresentation ↑R M ∧ Nonempty (tilde M ≅ I)` (REVERSE Stacks 01IA+01PC). Project-facing
  `fp_sheaf_affine_tilde` (no sorry) = `haveI : I.IsFinitePresentation := hI; exact External.affine_fp_tilde I`.
  Bridge = `tilde_free`+`tilde_of_presentation` (@012) + `tilde_exact` (@013) + `fp_sheaf_affine_tilde` (@015).
  **GOTCHA:** explicit `SheafOfModules.IsFinitePresentation I` mis-infers implicit `R` (sort mismatch) — use
  **dot notation `I.IsFinitePresentation`**; `IsLFP I` is defeq it, so `haveI` coercion is direct.
- **Module-theoretic core of 1.4 (iter-015, VERIFIED — `exists_finiteFreePresentation_of_noetherian`, axiom-clean).**
  Over Noetherian `R`, finite `M` ⇒ `∃ n (p : ModuleCat.of R (Fin n →₀ R) ⟶ M), Epi p ∧ Module.FinitePresentation R ↑(kernel p)`.
  `Module.Finite.exists_fin` + `ModuleCat.ofHom (Finsupp.linearCombination R s)`; Epi via `ModuleCat.epi_iff_surjective`
  needs `simp only [ModuleCat.hom_ofHom]` then `LinearMap.range_eq_top.mp` + `Finsupp.range_linearCombination`; kernel fp
  via `ModuleCat.kernelIsoKer` (submodule of finite module over Noetherian ⇒ `Module.Finite` ⇒ `Module.finitePresentation_of_finite`).
  **GOTCHA:** write `↑(kernel p)` in a `Type`-expecting position (else `HasZeroMorphisms (Type _)` fails — coercion must fire
  AFTER the category is pinned by `p`'s type). Reusable; tilde-transports to the Spec-R sheaf sequence.
- **1.4 `exists_free_resolution_step` blocked on 4 NAMED absent ingredients (iter-015):** (1) general-affine
  `X`→`Spec R` transport along `X.isoSpec` (module pullback + `IsLFP`/`IsFreeMod` preservation); (2) descent
  data-form re-sign of `External.descent_noetherian` (needs fibre products + module base change); (3) **FORWARD**
  Stacks 01PC `M` fp ⇒ `IsLFP (tilde M)` — `affine_fp_tilde` is reverse only; recommend anchor `External.tilde_isFP`;
  (4) flat pullback of a SES of `SheafOfModules` is exact (Mathlib only module-level `Module.Flat.lTensor_exact`).
  Do NOT attempt to close 1.4 until ≥(3)+(4) land.
- **1.4 ASSEMBLED but NOT closed (iter-016, VERIFIED — body sorry-free, transitively sorryAx).**
  `exists_free_resolution_step` now compiles with no _direct_ sorry, but `#print axioms` shows it
  transitively uses `sorryAx` (sorry count rose 6→7). Resolution of the 4 iter-015 gaps: (1)+(2) via
  re-signed `External.descent_noetherian` (data-descent form, delivers literal `Spec A₀`); (3) anchored
  `External.tilde_isFP`; (4) anchored `External.flat_pullback_exact`. Assembly = descent → `fp_sheaf_affine_tilde`
  → `exists_finiteFreePresentation_of_noetherian` (module SES via `ShortComplex.ShortExact.mk
  (ShortComplex.exact_kernel q)`) → `tilde_exact` → `External.flat_pullback_exact`. Helper `tilde_free_fin`
  (`IsFreeMod ~(Fin n →₀ R)` via `Finsupp.domLCongr (Equiv.ulift).symm ≪≫ tildeFinsupp (ULift (Fin n))`).
  **THE single residual gap blocking real closure:** `pullback_isFreeMod` + `pullback_isLFP` both reduce to
  the absent structure-sheaf pullback iso `(Scheme.Modules.pullback p).obj 𝒪_Y ≅ 𝒪_X` for a general scheme
  morphism. `SheafOfModules.pullbackObjFreeIso φ Λ` EXISTS but needs `[(Opens.map p.base).Final]` — `failed
  to synthesize` for general scheme morphisms (structure-sheaf pullback NOT wired up v4.30.0). `(pullback p).IsLeftAdjoint`
  IS an instance ⇒ given the unit iso, free-pullback follows via `free Λ = ∐ unit`. Next: build
  `pullbackObjUnitIso` (closes `pullback_isFreeMod`; `pullback_isLFP` also needs fp-globalization), or anchor both.
  **GOTCHA (anchor sigs over Scheme.Modules):** ascribe `(tilde M : (Spec R).Modules)` and conclude `IsLFP`
  (not `SheafOfModules.IsFinitePresentation`) to dodge `ModuleCat.{0,0}` / `SheafOfModules ?m` mismatch;
  pass a mapped `ShortComplex` as `_` (inferred) to downstream lemmas to avoid re-triggering
  `PreservesZeroMorphisms` synthesis on `(…).map F`.
- **1.4 `exists_free_resolution_step` CLOSED (iter-017, VERIFIED — sorryAx-free; sorry 7→5).** The two
  iter-016 residuals were discharged by anchoring, NOT building: added `axiom External.pullback_isFreeMod
  {X Y}(p:X⟶Y){M:Y.Modules}(h:IsFreeMod M):IsFreeMod ((Scheme.Modules.pullback p).obj M)` (L566) and
  `External.pullback_isLFP … (h:IsLFP M):IsLFP …` (L577); the project lemmas `pullback_isFreeMod`/`pullback_isLFP`
  became thin term-mode wrappers (`External.pullback_isFreeMod p h`). `#print axioms exists_free_resolution_step`
  (via `lean_verify`) = `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound, External.affine_fp_tilde, External.descent_noetherian,
  External.flat_pullback_exact, External.pullback_isFreeMod, External.pullback_isLFP, External.tilde_isFP}` —
  **NO `sorryAx`**. First §1 deep-theorem closure; affine-bridge + free-resolution sub-lane (open since iter-012)
  DONE. The two new anchors both reduce to the SAME confirmed Mathlib gap as iter-016 noted (`(Scheme.Modules.pullback
  p).obj 𝒪_Y ≅ 𝒪_X` + fp-globalization); `pullbackObjFreeIso` needs `[(Opens.map p.base).Final]`, absent v4.30.0.
  **Do NOT retry the direct `pullbackObjFreeIso`/structure-sheaf-pullback route in-loop** — confirmed absent 5+ ways
  iters 016–017; discharge upstream when Mathlib gains the final-functor instance, then both anchors become real proofs.
- **`j_!` (extension-by-zero) BUILT axiom-clean in ONE iter (iter-019, VERIFIED — 5 decls; planner expected a multi-iter partial).**
  The whole `j_!` construction + adjunction landed via a defeq shortcut, NOT the planned Kan-extension+sheafify route.
  KEY: `Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctor j` (= `j^*`) is **definitionally** `SheafOfModules.pushforward φ` for a ring-sheaf
  morphism `φ` Mathlib keeps inline; `SheafOfModules.pullback φ` is ALREADY its left adjoint via
  `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction φ` (`Sheaf/PullbackContinuous.lean`). So `extensionByZero j := SheafOfModules.pullback.{u}
  (restrictionRingSheafHom j)` and `extensionByZeroAdjunction j := pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (...)` (stated type
  `extensionByZero j ⊣ restrictFunctor j` holds by defeq). Decls (Basic.lean ~L1041–1112, namespace
  `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules`): `restrictionRingSheafHom` (def), `restrictFunctor_eq_pushforward` (lemma, `rfl`),
  `extensionByZero`, `extensionByZeroAdjunction`, + instances `IsLeftAdjoint` & `PreservesColimitsOfSize.{u,u}`
  (the "commutes with direct sums" fact 1.2 needs). All `lean_verify` = `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`.
  The sheaf-level `(pushforward φ).IsRightAdjoint` fires because `Opens U/X` are SMALL (`SmallCategory` via `Preorder`),
  so the presheaf instance (`Presheaf/Pullback.lean:97`, only the `v=u` version) applies, plus `HasWeakSheafify` +
  `WEqualsLocallyBijective` resolve. **GOTCHA:** `unfold restrictFunctor; infer_instance` for `IsRightAdjoint` FAILS
  (HO-unif blocks `F.op ⋙ ?R`) — give `φ` its proper `Sheaf.Hom` type via the anonymous constructor (`restrictionRingSheafHom`),
  then `infer_instance` succeeds. **DEAD ENDS (do NOT retry):** the SAFT route `isRightAdjoint_of_preservesLimits_of_isCoseparating`
  (`WellPowered`/`HasCoseparator`/`IsGrothendieckAbelian X.Modules` all fail to synthesize); the planned `Functor.lan`/`lanAdjunction`
  Kan route (unnecessary). **1.2 `exists_acyclic_surjection` still NOT closeable** — now needs base-change iso
  (`pullback g ⋙ j_! ≅ j_! ⋙ pullback g`) + derived acyclicity `Ext^q_Y(j_!𝒪,F)≅H^q(U,F)` (overlaps relExt strand); both multi-iter.

- **`opaque`/`noncomputable` over abelian module cats (iter-003, VERIFIED):** an
  `opaque foo : X.Modules` (or functor-cat-valued) needs `Nonempty` of its result
  type. Supply it from the zero object: `open scoped ZeroObject` then
  `instance : Nonempty X.Modules := ⟨0⟩` (abelian ⇒ `HasZeroObject`; functor cat
  into a zero-object cat likewise). The bare numeral `0` requires the `ZeroObject`
  scope open. Because the witness (`Classical.ofNonempty`) is noncomputable, every
  such `opaque`/`def` returning a module cat MUST be `noncomputable`.
